title: Move POI option in the toolbar
capture_instructions: A POI marker exists in the scene. The toolbar at top center shows the Move POI button (the Set Target POI icon with a move/arrows modifier, or a dedicated move icon). Hover over the Move POI button so its tooltip is displayed. The gizmo on the POI is dismissed (not active) — gizmo reactivates after clicking Move POI.
ui_state: POI placed, gizmo dismissed, hovering Move POI button in toolbar
